case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. WENDY AYALA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66035551) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100049965), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED AUG-23-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-26-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, WENDY
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 66035551) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYALA, WENDY $752.65 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,011.60, THERE'S A $725.00 CREDIT THAT WAS DEDUCTED FROM $1477.65 PRINCIPAL. SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 66035551) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, WENDY
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 66120150) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, WENDY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $725.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66035551) AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, WENDY

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, WENDY DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-26-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
